text.title: Pricing Experiment Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of the Experiment Plan, the Stripe config checklist, the post-experiment Decision Memo.

forbidden.pattern: plan.start_date later than the Stripe-config-checklist completion date (going live without verification)
grandfathering applied via "we will just not bill them yet" with no Stripe coupon or separate Price (grandfathering must be in Stripe, not in goodwill)
old Stripe Price object archived or deleted (must remain active so grandfathered subscriptions renew correctly)
multi-currency experiment without a separate Price per currency
decision_memo.decision = extend_with_adjustment for the third extension in a row (experiment is being kept alive to avoid the decision)
stripe_preflight.passed_at missing OR more than 7 days before plan.start_date

allowed-transformations.transformation: Pause the experiment mid-window (Stripe new-signup routing reverts to old Price) without ending it, when a guardrail metric is approached but not breached.
Localise the customer announcement copy per currency-region; keep the substance identical.
Round MRR delta numbers to the nearest $50 when reporting; keep dollar precision in the underlying readout file.

list.item: Plan written and committed BEFORE any Stripe change
Grandfather policy explicit, with Stripe coupon ID
scripts/stripe-pre-flight.py returned green within 7 days of start
Customer announcement sent before experiment goes live
Decision Memo committed within 48h of end_date
Old Stripe Price object remains active (never deleted)
